name: KFC Buttermilk Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Combine all of the ingredients in a large bowl and mix until smooth.
3. Flour your hands, pat the dough flat on waxed paper, and cut into biscuits using a biscuit cutter.
4. Place the biscuits onto a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 12 minutes or until golden brown.
